# Return Window

The returns policy allows customers to return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided the items are unused, in their original packaging, and accompanied by a receipt or order confirmation. Returns that are requested after the 30-day period will be considered on a case-by-case basis and may result in store credit instead of a cash refund.

[Source: returns_policy.md#return-window]
